title: Grid with repeat()
description: Create a grid with 5 equal columns using `repeat()`.

title: Responsive Grid with auto-fit
description: Create a grid that automatically creates columns with min 150px, max 1fr using `auto-fit`.

solution.css: .grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fit, minmax(150px, 1fr)); gap: 15px; }
